default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To discuss the unexpected pause in the Manifold-growthx.ai partnership due to staffing issues at Manifold.](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Manifold's new hire unexpectedly declined the job, forcing a pause in the project due to lack of bandwidth](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=60.0)
  - [Partnership to be revisited in August when Taylor returns from maternity leave](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Despite setback, both parties express mutual interest in future collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [growthx.ai has prepared three articles as outputs from work done so far](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)

## Topics

### Staffing Crisis at Manifold

  - [New hire meant to cover Taylor's maternity leave declined job at last minute (8 AM on start date)](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Rationale given: saw workload and decided against taking the job](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Taylor views it as "bullet dodged" but left Manifold scrambling to rearrange programs](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=230.0)
  - [Backup plans in place, but not ideal for project continuation](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)

### Project Pause and Future Plans

  - [Current contracts to be closed out due to lack of bandwidth at Manifold](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=63.0)
  - [Taylor hopes to reconnect and potentially restart partnership in August](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=70.0)
  - [Kyle (growthx.ai) prioritizes setting up the relationship for future success](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=173.0)
  - [Taylor has communicated internally that the partnership could be great fit long-term](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)

### Existing Work and Deliverables

  - [growthx.ai has generated three articles from engagement so far](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Taylor has seen and provided feedback on one article](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=373.0)
  - [Kyle offered to share all three articles for potential value, despite pause](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Taylor will leave articles behind as part of her transition](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=400.0)

### Maternity Leave and Transition

  - [Taylor being induced on Saturday (in 4 days)](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Attempting to wrap up work and transition before leave](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Partnership reconnection planned for August upon Taylor's return](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

## Next Steps

  - [growthx.ai to loop in appropriate parties regarding partnership pause](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Sarah (Manifold legal counsel) to wrap up any remaining contracting pieces](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=326.0)
  - [Taylor to review three articles from growthx.ai if time permits before leave](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Both parties open to questions/communication during remaining pilot period](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Reconnect in August to reassess partnership potential](https://fathom.video/share/-2xRB11CK-jRqHS8ejMyecMSPpeZ5iSZ?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)

action_items.description: Loop in appropriate parties at growthx.ai re project pause & contract wrap-up
Send 3 generated articles to Taylor (if not already done)
Review 3 generated articles from growthx.ai before maternity leave if time permits
Inform internal team about articles left behind for potential use during absence
